title: Tiptop Home Mouse Repellent, Mice Repellent Rat Deterrent with Strobe Lights and PIR, Ultrasonic Mouse Repeller Plug In Pest Control, Rodent Repellent for Rodents, Mice, Spiders, Mosquito,Black
features: 🐁 【360° ultrasonic mouse repellent 】 Mouse repellent is equipped with core functions and sophisticated technologies such as ultrasound, infrared induction, and photosensitive strobe lights to intervene step by step. Simply keep mice and other insects away.

🐁 【3 WORKING MODES】 Our ultrasonic pest repeller is designed to offer a variety of options to meet your training needs. The rodent repellent can be used day and night while reducing energy consumption. Three levels can be adjusted as needed to protect your home 24 hours a day and put an end to mice.

🐁【NO DEAD SPACE COVERAGE】With a large control area of ​​120 square meters and 360-degree coverage, the spider repellent can powerfully drive away mice in every corner of the room like a steadfast sentry, always protecting your home from intruders. At the same time, strobe lights can have a more shocking effect in the dark.

🐁【Safe and Comfortable】Unlike traditional traps and poisons, only physical methods are used to rid your home of pests, avoiding the use of harmful chemicals that can pose a danger to children, pets and the planet. With this environmentally friendly and safe solution, you can enjoy a pest-free home and keep your hands free.

🐁【 ONE FITS ALL】The rodent repellent ultrasonic has a significant repellent and deterrent effect on rats, squirrels, rat repellent and other pests. The mini rat deterrent can be placed in attics, garages, basements, rooms, storage rooms, etc. and used anywhere indoors. Choose our mouse repeller to solve your pest problem and drive the pests out of your home.
description: SO MANY MOUSE REPELLENTS CHOOSE WHY CHOOSE US? ⭐3 speakers, 360° full surround rat repellent ⭐120 square meters super large area coverage ⭐12 flashing lights, the better driving effect at night ⭐3 modes for 24/7 pest control ⭐PIR sensor, light sensor strobe light, energy saving ⭐variable and fixed frequency to prevent mice from adapting ⭐No need to clean rat residue and free your hands. ⭐Safe and environmentally friendly, no toxic chemicals are released 📢USING TIPS: 1. Please keep the device free from obstacles. Passing through walls or obstacles will weaken the effect of the device. 2. Ultrasonic mosquito repellent will be effective within a few weeks. This is not a short-term process. Please be patient and wait for the final results. 3. It is recommended to change the working mode regularly to prevent rodents from getting used to the ultrasonic waves and to ensure that pests are constantly deterred. 📦 PACKAGE INCLUDED: 1 xMice repellent 1 x User Manual 1 x USB Cable
